title: Buttons for Craft 1000pcs Mixed Assorted Colorful Buttons Resin Round Crafting Button for Crafts DIY Knitting Sewing Painting Handmade Ornament Doll Decoration
features: ✿ Sturdy Material: Made of natural resin material, which is hard and firm. These buttons have bright color and strong simulation, which bring themselves lovely appearances. Also are well-designed with flat bases, clear smooth edges so you won't be cut using them.

✿ Simple Round Button: Button size: about 0.7cm/0.27" to 1.5cm/0.59",and are mostly 2-hole and 4-hole buttons.The traditional round button, there are a variety of colors to choose from, simple and universal style.Vibrant and energetic colors are good for craft making and color sorting, assorted colors in random delivery.

✿ Clothing Ornaments: These clothing button is perfect for sewing. With these special buttons, a simple shirt will instantly became brilliant! Also suitable for denim jackets, sweaters, jeans, etc. The wooden material is very durable and light, you can replace the old buttons with it.

✿ You Will Get: includes about 1000 pieces of colored resin buttons, mostly 4-hole with some 2-hole types, enough for multiple daily use. Different designs are used for different knitting/sewing/crafts.

✿Multipurpose: It widely applicated in knitting, sewing, crocheting, making DIY crafts. Perfect for toy, cloth, shoes, scrapbooking, cards, holiday gifts, souvenir, children's manual button painting, button sorting game with Girls Boys, and handmade ornament, etc.
description: Product Description Many different sizes and colors to suit your crafting and sewing projects. Reminder: Small items. Not suitable for children under 3 years old. Give play to children's imagination and cultivate children's interest. make a gift for a friend Different colors and sizes will suit different needs. Looking for a some fun craft ideas? These resin buttons can be attached using glue, tape, thread, ribbon and much more for kids to do craft class and improve sorting and counting skills at school or home.
